releases.author: arg1998
releases.description: :wrench: **Patch 1.1.2**: In response to [#4436<sup>:eyes:</sup><sub></sub>](https://github.com/obsidianmd/obsidian-releases/pull/4436#issuecomment-2451720547), this patch fixed UI, naming, code style, and API usage issues.

releases.author: arg1998
releases.description: :wrench:**Patch 1.1.1**: In response to [#4436<sup>:eyes:</sup>](https://github.com/obsidianmd/obsidian-releases/pull/4436#issuecomment-2415669063), this patch will fix the HTML styling inside the JavaScript file and programatically looks for Obsidian's configuration folder instead of hardcoding it.

releases.author: arg1998
releases.description:
- [x] Introduced a Settings page with options for SVG handling:
  - [x] Option to duplicate SVGs to a specified location (Obsidian attachment folder or a custom path).
  - [x] Option to either modify the SVG in place or work on a duplicate version.
- [x] Added a feature to display the drawable SVG tags present in the file, allowing users to edit only the existing tags (e.g., `<path>`).
